name: What's my case worth if NY AI referral botched my injury claim?
description: Lost value + fees; $50k+ typical for strong cases in NY.

mainEntity.name: What's my case worth if NY AI referral botched my injury claim?

acceptedAnswer.text: Lost value + fees; $50k+ typical for strong cases in NY.
acceptedAnswer.description: Varies; often lost settlement (e.g., $50k-$500k) plus fees, minus contributory fault. NY follows case-by-case valuation. Key factors: (1) Original case strength; (2) AI error impact; (3) Comparables. Get free eval from malpractice firm.
